summary: US-012 tier filters are fully implemented and all checks pass. Domain layer has filterByTier(cards, tiers) returning all cards when set is empty. TierFilter component renders Open/Working/Deep toggle buttons with colored indicators, aria-pressed for accessibility, and a Clear filters button when any tier is active. BrowseAllCards integrates tier filtering chained with text search. All 288 tests pass including 13 filterByTier unit tests, 11 TierFilter component tests, and 12 BrowseAllCards integration tests.
